note: Instantiate + inspect only. No task submit. No bridge patch. No docker restart.

x96_plan.workflow: User -> WebUI -> MASTER -> child workers -> MASTER review -> WebUI

steps.goal: Read project context, roadmap, and identify relevant files/layers.
steps.input_hint: Use docs/ROADMAP.md and runtime reports first.

steps.goal: Verify the true failing layer or required change using logs/evidence.
steps.input_hint: Do not patch until root cause is confirmed.

steps.goal: Run focused checks and collect pass/fail evidence.
steps.input_hint: Export full logs to runtime/temp/*.txt.

steps.goal: Summarize worker results for MASTER review.
steps.input_hint: Report must state pass/fail, evidence, and remaining risk.

master_review_policy.pass_condition: VERIFY ok and REPORT has evidence
master_review_policy.fail_action: retry step or use limited fallback then send updated instruction to child worker
